snippet: Build real apps in Google AI Studio powered by Antigravity and Firebase. ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏ ͏ ‍͏
subject: Denys, introducing full-stack vibe coding in Google AI Studio
body:
Email not displaying correctly? View it  
online<https://notifications.google.com/g/vib/AEJ26qsVTSZaYti5NUslTenS6orDo0ZPjWcNQaCmzHlKH02qtXCuNk04yuUCDG1fh35sY4U6by2Cg2_E5Xz_F5EmP8z-ZHneMbkeboJ9USsHqRqQZCjv6NRNeKGWbvB1Vd1pih4>

Google AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AEJ26qsaQashFluOtmF3aDa_tdjK58-nE_wtsodX5b84HvgprxDFUzOx0bqx3gtgEfYUdbilTtBpZ4E1Yr_01y9xnFRy0Z0yHH9eLjmfnLk6BuzUakyYuJ-ly87Av210stvat2DIXrFTwyyxg0yWZnQ0>

Introducing full-stack vibe coding in Google AI Studio

Try in Google AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvuJPu03XjLjZCJRJRHBGrGhj2l_tSR_LVI4pkokcmdsOv_bWfqu3UzQtHJMfP1unR_fsJD5-s4GxOpCZfDHqKDlzlwGWPwthXXllTYqdg7fMpze0JLeFmvvyQNvKDLxJ139OkQclqmzOp-47NTRNUuzJvtltq9kPg>

Hi Denys,

We’re excited to introduce a completely upgraded build experience in Google  
AI Studio, featuring a new agent powered by Antigravity!

Now you can turn simple prompts into production-ready, full-stack apps—with  
complex UI elements and Firebase backends and authentication. And when  
you're ready to launch, deploy directly to Cloud Run.

- Build multiplayer  
experiences<https://c.gle/AEJ26qt3I6hO4YOkqm9qHoTAljgrA1eoMMCH_qDP11HDu-msUVJkoWEm6ZbqnTGH_ls99izbkF6v-5GNtB2-g5RYQWWIxjYRCURaGC3qxOJDg6AkYZ9mxBTrCCLD7f-kzVEKMCNr1EaCqffBrTwVYSwJgxubThFagvir-L8ns6VcOw>:  
Create real-time multiplayer games, collaborative workspaces, and shared  
tools that connect users in real time.
- Enrich apps with third-party  
services<https://c.gle/AEJ26qtFXFuns7cTh-1D-wJQTOoLzFuQz0iNBhwe9BMJoPF4oKsZiW1vN3WQIjJKUgFaqCg-PoCTkcaxHOjDG6hdKFas1p-UqKUs-jYlLbt9N0QPspCznFtEiPLAvzvKHVYVbT2FlI2wQENs87cJK_EurnfkG3SsZQlQ7GN95NaWJSAVckQ>:  
Bring your own API credentials to more securely integrate services like  
databases, payment processors and Google services like Maps
- Add databases and  
authentication<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvR-YOASilp1yXZNv2qioxpzgcRPt9zeZOXmZ_rotIVC3jGhNvXGO5pz7uKU0nBIj59kuLXizP-HditVq8Xd8AEEPvA0-4ry804PD_vrZ57JBq1MAqEdvjthTCBzt3B0Sfw4g0y8-ZfR3RkqhLiq2slA_oGbg5_1uu3fzwo0n2F>:  
The new agent proactively detects when your app needs a database or user  
identity, and then provisions Cloud Firestore for databases and Firebase  
Authentication for identity.

A GIF showing a multiplayer experience using 3D  
particles.<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvjwvYJaBj3CdJnPrg6cG2jozoYgh5vFAz5O_nWs5Y_C3C-T0e1AwPFe3CPGmV_8Oj-fTp2UDAFrD45tLRRFEZzewavP4MW-3OXP8x3nINGCuOjpJ0GqxTdvhpIr6o8VTjhPAHZrP2nd9emcS6ahlgoXAqSsbnolVkn8dUsrFI>

Explore the demo apps

Experience the new agent by remixing our latest full stack apps in the  
Google AI Studio gallery:

- Cosmic  
Flow<https://c.gle/AEJ26qtsj-xS_CDsbiX-MKScbWa7jFUdpvApH4xCuDc3ywbpEMMwL8klYMNI_BmZJneJBcTYvc2dsQG66wkWDp6EeigXgKwDuf1oggrvoXF33qixmFd-g-jEVG0d-J9tYYK2zAmq2W6cgWgXlF-uUUEX8xfkms8UaJYWasL2i9UOLZBs>:  
Create dynamic particle streams with friends spawning 3D particles with  
threejs.

-  
Geoseeker<https://c.gle/AEJ26qu-b27qEDTc1TfstSfgRrjKYz9MI10UAV-lW4gPeL5MDzJ4cW75YyG1HzylHQQTYJK7kwnN4jJ4-azE49jAyFR9ti2ObDCgfP86FjCqelQcXWv48dgiWsWqTmMbyPtRS3SW0QFshZ6a9ZgDilTt3up1p6TW47kL60opWtLI>:  
Play a game of hide and seek on Google Maps.

- Laser  
Tag<https://c.gle/AEJ26quSjVvIROaekswWV39zhWPnBAlNdboIHtwZbT1G61T93wBQ-Ifv1pb-EWomNLNZSUVoAkF4UEMfp9XUSGvLHHjN2ARnlGuFkWWgj8iMB2EbCbhkmP7dBTfV-BcdjTW18RUMWpLLcHrUejPUkBx7kIcfT7I4GLREAPIfkLckgp0_ywdT3yKhJw>:  
Shoot lasers at AI opponents in a multiplayer first person laser tag game.

Explore more  
apps<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvqWWxVqGe-xaCBmjPbsNaKT_i6k6WD1Cej8ppsNLIPS-8vfkBp8Nu-ptEwhx87cxhMFPZ6HZj8CCQ5c86s4kWHxXuCNL7XR1eNgqjtG9uiCe4AglUUqA7njt9KYUNgXOYrY8drVOzoo3so4JwTNdIiot-Ig-_PA6Cjnc2L-Zmn9JS0zBtVBzBKXTYQWDhZlW6th_BWUBhLrCP88Kk>

Happy vibe coding,

The Google AI Studio team

Prompt  
models<https://c.gle/AEJ26qsmwEodP6vRaZQrVZ3E3tnYX39vmWbFjTKUeSBrJsRJYwDmxHE2HoBLSq5Xv-212a8PkKSWGyTbuCxnekbXeLHRTMaJTKPi_mnYvJfPj0Hn6OvR0kjCjYV4dohJI1G--vKOaoH-6TKJ0rpkjxZoDKrDrqWncFVSzgTnn-y2poD8DezRDLjdTkfY0v9HCgGfYUlThK0GbIuK3adyZhTzsjGBpMhf9jBqpbZGrgKn4sWQXLFBSBgfmyyCc2QvxzoD>
